# Foliage reflectance and transmittance spectra (from 350 to 2500 nm) from Hyytiala (Finland),
# Jarvselja (Estonia) and Bily Kriz (the Czech Republic).
# https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2021.112804
#  
# Mean reflectance (HDRF) and transmittance from twelve sampling positions within a sampled tree BK-PI_AB-2:
#    - Bily Kriz, spruce (measured in September 2019)
#    - Reflectance and transmittance spectra averaged from:
#        + both side of the samples (adaxial and abaxial)
#        + current-year and one-year-old needles
#        + canopy positions top-of-canopy (predominantly sun-exposed) and bottom-of-canopy (predominantly shaded)
#  
#wl (nm)   R      T
350	0.1477	0.1151
351	0.1427	0.1271
